overview.title: Task Management REST API
overview.purpose: A RESTful API for managing tasks, built with Node.js and SQLite.

components.name: API Server
components.description: Express.js HTTP server handling all API requests
components.interface_summary: Exposes REST endpoints on configured PORT; responds with JSON

components.name: Validation Middleware
components.description: Validates inbound task payloads before they reach controllers

steps: Send POST /todos to create a task

operations.health_check: GET /health returns 200 OK when server is running
operations.logging: Request method and path logged to stdout at INFO level

common_issues.cause: title field missing from request body
common_issues.fix: Include a non-empty title string in the JSON body

known_limitations: Real-time task sync is out of scope
summary: Documentation covers both components and both API endpoints; intended for developer operators; covers the happy path and one common error scenario.
